# 据吉文档

> Congrats on setting up a new Doks project!

- [页面未找到](https://coolguy2020.github.io/jujidata-docs/404/): 您正在寻找的页面不存在或已被移动。请检查网址，使用导航浏览各个板块，或返回首页。
- [隐私政策](https://coolguy2020.github.io/jujidata-docs/privacy/): 了解我们如何收集、使用和保护您的个人数据，您对信息拥有的权利，以及如何联系我们。
- [博客](https://coolguy2020.github.io/jujidata-docs/blog/): Read product updates, release highlights, and practical tips that explain what’s new, why it matters, and how to get the most value from this project.
- [文档](https://coolguy2020.github.io/jujidata-docs/docs/): 据吉文档的主页面，包含所有指南、参考和资源。

## 博客

> Read product updates, release highlights, and practical tips that explain what’s new, why it matters, and how to get the most value from this project.

- [Example Post](https://coolguy2020.github.io/jujidata-docs/blog/example-post/): Learn how to write clear, structured product update posts that explain what changed, why it matters, and how users can successfully adopt new features.

## 文档

> 据吉文档的主页面，包含所有指南、参考和资源。

- [试标空间 (Sandbox)](https://coolguy2020.github.io/jujidata-docs/docs/quick_guides/): 通过小样任务测试供应商交付质量，降低大规模作业风险。
- [模版中心](https://coolguy2020.github.io/jujidata-docs/docs/templates/): 预置 10 大主流 AI 标注模版，支持高度自定义配置。
- [指南](https://coolguy2020.github.io/jujidata-docs/docs/guides/): 所有实用指南的集合，帮助你快速上手和深入了解。
- [参考](https://coolguy2020.github.io/jujidata-docs/docs/reference/): 详细的参考文档，涵盖所有功能和API。
- [Resources](https://coolguy2020.github.io/jujidata-docs/docs/docs/resources/): Discover curated links to official docs, tools, templates, and learning materials that help you deepen your knowledge and get more from this project.

### 试标空间 (Sandbox)

> 通过小样任务测试供应商交付质量，降低大规模作业风险。


### 模版中心

> 预置 10 大主流 AI 标注模版，支持高度自定义配置。

- [2D 矩形框标注 (Bounding Box)](https://coolguy2020.github.io/jujidata-docs/docs/docs/2d-%E7%9F%A9%E5%BD%A2%E6%A1%86%E6%A0%87%E6%B3%A8-bounding-box/): 最通用的物体检测标注模版，支持多标签分类与复杂属性关联。

### 指南

> 所有实用指南的集合，帮助你快速上手和深入了解。

- [快速开始](https://coolguy2020.github.io/jujidata-docs/docs/docs/%E5%BF%AB%E9%80%9F%E5%BC%80%E5%A7%8B/): 请移步快速上手通道，迅速完成一个简单的数据标注项目。

### 参考

> 详细的参考文档，涵盖所有功能和API。

- [Example Reference](https://coolguy2020.github.io/jujidata-docs/docs/docs/example-reference/): Learn how to design concise, comprehensive reference pages that document concepts, options, and behavior clearly so users can quickly find exact answers.
